com.shanbay.lib.texas.misc

  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Recyclable
    直接已知子类:
    Appearance, Document, Element, Line, Paragraph.Builder, Segment

    @Hidden
public class DefaultRecyclable
extends java.lang.Object
implements Recyclable
